message:
chore(engine): update beads issue tracker metadata

Sync .beads/issues.jsonl with latest closed bead states reflecting
completed work on assumptions ledger, semantic twin, test logging
schema, and unit test taxonomy contracts from concurrent agent sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -737,7 +737,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.13.3","title":"[FRX-13.3] Assumptions Ledger, Falsification Monitors, and Deterministic Demotion","description":"Implement assumptions ledger and falsification monitors.

Purpose:
- record assumptions active at compile and runtime decision points,
- detect assumption violations via monitors,
- trigger deterministic demotion/fallback when assumptions fail,
- preserve replayability of assumption state.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Assumptions are first-class ledger entities linked to decisions and artifacts.
2. Violation monitors are explicit, test-covered, and replayable.
3. Assumption failures deterministically trigger conservative mode.

Testing and Logging Contract:
- Add comprehensive unit tests for primary, edge, and failure paths with deterministic fixtures and explicit expected outcomes.
- Add end-to-end test scripts that exercise real user workflows plus adversarial/degraded scenarios, including fallback and recovery paths.
- Emit detailed structured logs for unit and e2e runs (scenario_id, trace_id when available, seed, timing, decision path, outcome) and retain artifacts for replay/triage.
- CI must fail on unit/e2e regression or missing logging artifacts for this bead's deliverables.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PearlTower","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:18.485541047Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T08:00:31.525113732Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T08:00:31.525076743Z","close_reason":"done: assumptions_ledger.rs — 46 tests, append-only assumption ledger with 5 categories (Statistical/Behavioral/Resource/Safety/Structural), 4 origins, falsification monitors (Threshold/Drift/Coverage/Invariant/Budget), demotion controller with severity-mapped actions (Advisory→NoAction, Warning→SuspendAdaptive, Critical/Fatal→EnterSafeMode), chain-hashed history, replayable state","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-control-plane","phase-frontier","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.13.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.13.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:27.785456077Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.13.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:27.963383742Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.13.4","title":"[FRX-13.4] Controller Composition Matrix, Timescale Separation, and Interference Gates","description":"Define and enforce controller composition compatibility.

Include:
- interference matrix (router/optimizer/fallback interactions),
- timescale-separation statements,
- interference microbench harness,
- acceptance gates for composed controller deployments.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Composition matrix identifies allowed/forbidden controller combinations.
2. Interference microbench artifacts are required before composed rollout.
3. Unsafe compositions fail closed to deterministic baseline control.

Testing and Logging Contract:
- Add comprehensive unit tests for primary, edge, and failure paths with deterministic fixtures and explicit expected outcomes.
- Add end-to-end test scripts that exercise real user workflows plus adversarial/degraded scenarios, including fallback and recovery paths.
- Emit detailed structured logs for unit and e2e runs (scenario_id, trace_id when available, seed, timing, decision path, outcome) and retain artifacts for replay/triage.
- CI must fail on unit/e2e regression or missing logging artifacts for this bead's deliverables.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:18.947071469Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:32.047811116Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-control-plane","phase-frontier","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.13.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.13.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:28.149763421Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.13.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.13.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:28.401902860Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.13.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:28.630291398Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.14","title":"[FRX-14] Local-to-Global Semantic Coherence Engine (Sheaf/Descent/Obstruction Contracts)","description":"Establish local-to-global semantic coherence machinery so drop-in compatibility holds beyond isolated fixtures.

Scope:
- local semantic atlas extraction,
- global coherence/gluing checks across component boundaries and hydration seams,
- explicit obstruction certificates with deterministic fallback routing,
- cross-version compatibility transport maps.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Local semantic contracts can be composed and checked for global coherence.
2. Global inconsistency emits machine-readable obstruction artifacts.
3. Obstructions trigger deterministic fallback routes instead of silent drift.
4. Cross-version compatibility transport rules are explicit and test-addressable.

Program-Wide Test Gate:
- Every child task must define comprehensive unit-test scope, end-to-end scenario scripts, and detailed structured logging artifacts.
- Feature closure requires linked evidence that unit/e2e suites passed with deterministic fixtures and replay/triage logs.
- Any missing or stale test/logging evidence blocks milestone promotion and release gating.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:19.332964831Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:54.708091362Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-semantics","phase-frontier","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.14.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:37.024240265Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.14.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:37.514615719Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.14.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:37.640755657Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.14.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:37.737332576Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Outputs feed global coherence and obstruction analysis.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Local atlas schema is deterministic and versioned.
2. Atlas entries link directly to compatibility fixtures and traces.

Testing and Logging Contract:
- Add comprehensive unit tests for primary, edge, and failure paths with deterministic fixtures and explicit expected outcomes.
- Add end-to-end test scripts that exercise real user workflows plus adversarial/degraded scenarios, including fallback and recovery paths.
- Emit detailed structured logs for unit and e2e runs (scenario_id, trace_id when available, seed, timing, decision path, outcome) and retain artifacts for replay/triage.
- CI must fail on unit/e2e regression or missing logging artifacts for this bead's deliverables.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GreenBay","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:19.729446717Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T06:04:15.691334513Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-semantics","phase-frontier","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T03:38:46.754453004Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Added integration test crate test local_semantic_atlas_integration plus contract docs/json and replayable gate scripts. README now includes FRX Local Semantic Atlas Gate commands and artifact paths. Validation: rch-backed cargo check for local_semantic_atlas_integration completed successfully; additional rch test/clippy commands are currently contending with long-running remote compile sessions and are being re-driven with isolated target dirs.","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:52:26Z"},{"id":373,"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14.1","author":"GreenBay","text":"Follow-up: FRX-14.1 gate wrapper now uses quiet rch invocation and a configurable timeout via RCH_TIMEOUT_SECONDS (default 1800) in scripts/run_frx_local_semantic_atlas_suite.sh to avoid indefinite remote hangs. Additional validation signal: rch exec -q with cargo fmt --check returned exit 0. Workspace-wide cargo check all-targets and FRX-14.1 test/clippy reruns still experience remote rch stall behavior under concurrent worker load; reruns will continue with isolated target dirs.","created_at":"2026-02-26T07:00:51Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.14.2","title":"[FRX-14.2] Global Coherence Checker for Cross-Boundary Composition","description":"Implement global gluing/descent checker that composes local contracts into app-level semantic guarantees.

Coverage:
- cross-component interactions,
- suspense/hydration boundaries,
- effect ordering under composition.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Gluing checker can certify coherent compositions and flag incompatible ones.
2. Coherence results are deterministic and replayable.
3. Checker outputs are integrated into compile/runtime gating.

 {"id":"bd-mjh3.14.3","title":"[FRX-14.3] Obstruction Certificates and Deterministic Fallback Planner","description":"Create obstruction certificate system for global incompatibilities.

Behavior:
- emit minimal obstruction witnesses,
- map obstructions to deterministic fallback plans,
- preserve traceability into verification and release gates.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Obstruction certificates are minimal, reproducible, and machine-readable.
2. Every obstruction class maps to explicit deterministic fallback behavior.
3. Obstruction artifacts are consumed by release and adoption gates.

Testing and Logging Contract:
- Add comprehensive unit tests for primary, edge, and failure paths with deterministic fixtures and explicit expected outcomes.
- Add end-to-end test scripts that exercise real user workflows plus adversarial/degraded scenarios, including fallback and recovery paths.
- Emit detailed structured logs for unit and e2e runs (scenario_id, trace_id when available, seed, timing, decision path, outcome) and retain artifacts for replay/triage.
- CI must fail on unit/e2e regression or missing logging artifacts for this bead's deliverables.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:20.527191764Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:31.721849913Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-semantics","phase-frontier","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.14.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:29.019342351Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.14.4","title":"[FRX-14.4] Cross-Version Semantic Transport Ledger and Compatibility Morphisms","description":"Build compatibility transport ledger across React versions and ecosystem semantic variants.

Goal:
- encode what semantics can be transported unchanged,
- identify where adapters/fallback are required,
- prevent accidental regression masking across version boundaries.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Transport ledger provides explicit mapping from source semantic contract to target contract.
2. Non-transportable behaviors are classified and linked to fallback/adaptation strategy.
3. Release claims across versions reference transport evidence.

Testing and Logging Contract:
- Add comprehensive unit tests for primary, edge, and failure paths with deterministic fixtures and explicit expected outcomes.
- Add end-to-end test scripts that exercise real user workflows plus adversarial/degraded scenarios, including fallback and recovery paths.
- Emit detailed structured logs for unit and e2e runs (scenario_id, trace_id when available, seed, timing, decision path, outcome) and retain artifacts for replay/triage.
- CI must fail on unit/e2e regression or missing logging artifacts for this bead's deliverables.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:20.931843017Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:31.585253751Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-semantics","phase-frontier","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.14.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:29.209899752Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.14.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T02:39:29.404938670Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-mjh3.2.3","title":"[FRX-02.3] Unsupported Semantics, Escape Hatches, and Deterministic Fallback Rules","description":"Define escape-hatch policy for unsupported/ambiguous semantics.

Deliver:
- precise fallback triggers,
- diagnostics to explain why compile path was rejected,
- compatibility-preserving execution route for unsupported patterns,
- guidance for incremental hardening of unsupported cases.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Unsupported cases are explicit and justified.
2. Fallback behavior is deterministic and user-safe.
3. Diagnostic output is actionable.

Testing and Logging Contract:
- Add comprehensive unit tests for primary, edge, and failure paths with deterministic fixtures and explicit expected outcomes.
- Add end-to-end test scripts that exercise real user workflows plus adversarial/degraded scenarios, including fallback and recovery paths.
- Emit detailed structured logs for unit and e2e runs (scenario_id, trace_id when available, seed, timing, decision path, outcome) and retain artifacts for replay/triage.
- CI must fail on unit/e2e regression or missing logging artifacts for this bead's deliverables.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"FoggyOwl","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:44:00.448890876Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T04:19:23.998336432Z","closed_at":"2026-02-26T04:19:23.998312096Z","close_reason":"Completed FRX-02.3 unsupported-semantics deterministic fallback contract with fresh rch-only check/test/clippy pass artifacts at artifacts/frx_unsupported_semantics_fallback_rules/20260226T041338Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-semantics","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:44:01.365075728Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":367,"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.2.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed FRX-02.3 unsupported-semantics + deterministic fallback contract slice with fresh `rch`-only pass artifacts.

Delivered scope:
- `crates/franken-engine/src/hook_effect_contract.rs`
- `crates/franken-engine/tests/hook_effect_fallback_contract_integration.rs`
- `docs/FRX_UNSUPPORTED_SEMANTICS_FALLBACK_RULES_V1.md`
- `scripts/run_frx_unsupported_semantics_fallback_rules.sh`
- `scripts/e2e/frx_unsupported_semantics_fallback_rules_replay.sh`

What was implemented:
- Added explicit unsupported-semantics trigger taxonomy in `hook_effect_contract`:
  - `HookTopologyDrift`, `DependencyShapeDrift`, `OutOfRenderHookExecution`,
    `SchedulerOrderingAmbiguity`, `UnsupportedHookPrimitive`, `TransformationProofMissing`
- Added deterministic fallback-route mapping:
  - compatibility runtime lane, baseline interpreter lane, deterministic safe-mode lane.
- Added stable error-code and hardening-guidance emitters per trigger.
- Added `classify_unsupported_semantics(...)` for hook-rule violations.
- Added `build_unsupported_semantics_diagnostic(...)` with deterministic structured diagnostic payload + derivable evidence ID.
- Added unit tests in `hook_effect_contract.rs` for classification, deterministic mapping, and diagnostic stability.
- Added integration tests validating:
  - hook topology drift fails-closed with compatibility route
  - out-of-render violation routes to deterministic safe-mode
  - identical input tuple yields identical diagnostics/IDs
- Added `rch`-only gate/replay wrappers with fail-closed local-fallback detection and parser-log schema validation.

Fresh pass artifacts:
- `artifacts/frx_unsupported_semantics_fallback_rules/20260226T041338Z/run_manifest.json`
- `artifacts/frx_unsupported_semantics_fallback_rules/20260226T041338Z/events.jsonl`
- `artifacts/frx_unsupported_semantics_fallback_rules/20260226T041338Z/commands.txt`

Pass summary from runner:
- `cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test hook_effect_fallback_contract_integration` PASS
- `cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test hook_effect_fallback_contract_integration` PASS (3/3)
- `cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test hook_effect_fallback_contract_integration -- -D warnings` PASS
- parser log schema validation PASS on emitted events.

Note:
- Workspace-wide gates remain outside this bead scope due unrelated pre-existing repository drift.
","created_at":"2026-02-26T04:19:20Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.2.4","title":"[FRX-02.4] Cross-Version Compatibility Matrix (React/Browser/API Surfaces)","description":"Create the cross-version compatibility matrix.

Map behavior and support status for:
- React 18 vs React 19 semantics,
- browser API interactions that affect rendering/effects,
- edge API families (legacy class components, portals, refs, concurrent primitives).

Matrix must drive both test selection and release claims.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Version matrix exists with per-feature status.
2. Matrix rows are linked to fixtures/tests.
3. Release claims reference matrix evidence.

Testing and Logging Contract:
- Add comprehensive unit tests for primary, edge, and failure paths with deterministic fixtures and explicit expected outcomes.
- Add end-to-end test scripts that exercise real user workflows plus adversarial/degraded scenarios, including fallback and recovery paths.
- Emit detailed structured logs for unit and e2e runs (scenario_id, trace_id when available, seed, timing, decision path, outcome) and retain artifacts for replay/triage.
- CI must fail on unit/e2e regression or missing logging artifacts for this bead's deliverables.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"FoggyOwl","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:44:00.832904926Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T04:34:43.397366495Z","closed_at":"2026-02-26T04:34:43.397342511Z","close_reason":"Completed FRX-02.4 cross-version compatibility matrix contract/tests/gate/replay with fresh rch-only pass artifacts at artifacts/frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix/20260226T042730Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-semantics","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:44:01.537609626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:44:01.712424744Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":368,"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.2.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed FRX-02.4 cross-version compatibility matrix slice with fresh `rch`-only pass artifacts.

Delivered scope:
- `docs/FRX_CROSS_VERSION_COMPATIBILITY_MATRIX_V1.md`
- `docs/frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix_v1.json`
- `crates/franken-engine/tests/frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix.rs`
- `scripts/run_frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix_suite.sh`
- `scripts/e2e/frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix_replay.sh`

What was implemented:
- Added machine-readable matrix contract (`franken-engine.frx-cross-version-compat-matrix.v1`) covering:
  - React 18.3 vs 19.0 surfaces
  - browser constraints for chromium/firefox/webkit
  - API-family coverage: hooks/effects, legacy class components, portals/refs, concurrent primitives, browser render observers
  - deterministic compatibility routes (`compile_native`, `compatibility_fallback`, `deterministic_safe_mode`)
  - per-case deterministic test-selector tags and release-claim tags
- Added integration tests validating:
  - declared family coverage and per-case contract completeness
  - deterministic test-selection projection from matrix tags
  - deterministic release-claim projection + structured parser-log event payload fields
- Added `rch`-only gate/replay wrappers with local-fallback rejection and parser-log schema validation.

Fresh pass artifacts:
- `artifacts/frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix/20260226T042730Z/run_manifest.json`
- `artifacts/frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix/20260226T042730Z/events.jsonl`
- `artifacts/frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix/20260226T042730Z/commands.txt`

Pass summary:
- `cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix` PASS
- `cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix` PASS (3/3)
- `cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix -- -D warnings` PASS
- parser log schema validation PASS on emitted events.

Notes:
- During validation I fixed a compile issue (`include_str!` requires a string literal) in the test fixture loader.
- Workspace-wide gates remain outside this bead scope due unrelated pre-existing repository drift.
","created_at":"2026-02-26T04:34:39Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.20","title":"[FRX-20] Comprehensive Test Matrix and Evidence-Grade Logging Enforcement Program","description":"Program intent: ensure every FRX workstream ships with comprehensive unit tests, deterministic end-to-end scripts, and evidence-grade logging artifacts that make failures reproducible and diagnosable.

Scope:
- define program-wide unit/e2e taxonomy and fixture standards,
- establish deterministic, high-signal logging schema for test and e2e runs,
- enforce CI gates for coverage, flake control, and artifact completeness,
- bind milestone/release promotion to test+logging evidence quality.

Why this matters:
Without a dedicated enforcement spine, testing/logging requirements can drift into soft guidance. FRX-20 makes them hard delivery obligations.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Program-wide test taxonomy and fixture standards are machine-readable and versioned.
2. Every FRX lane has explicit unit and e2e obligations with deterministic pass/fail criteria.
3. Test/e2e logging schema includes high-fidelity debugging fields and artifact retention rules.
4.  {"id":"bd-mjh3.20.2","title":"[FRX-20.2] Unit-Test Depth Gate: Coverage, Mutation, and Failure-Mode Obligations","description":"Implement objective unit-test quality gates that block promotion when tests are shallow or brittle.

Scope:
- minimum statement/branch/path coverage targets per subsystem,
- mutation-testing threshold policy for critical modules,
- mandatory failure-mode tests (timeouts, cancellation, drift, malformed input, fallback triggers),
- CI policy for coverage/mutation regressions.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Coverage thresholds are explicit by subsystem and enforced in CI.
2. Mutation score thresholds are defined for critical runtime/compiler modules.
3. Failure-mode unit tests are mandatory for high-risk decision/control surfaces.
4. CI gate fails closed on threshold regressions.
5. Unit-depth outputs are correlated with e2e scenario risk classes to prevent local-optimum regressions.
6. Gate failures emit detailed structured logs plus deterministic rerun scripts for CI and local reproduction.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PearlTower","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:08.321937906Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T20:15:25.913825971Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["implementation-complete"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.20.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.20.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:28.223841014Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.20.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:28.471379217Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.20.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:28.686960934Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.20.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:28.934540295Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.20.3","title":"[FRX-20.3] End-to-End Scenario Matrix with Differential and Chaos Lanes","description":"Define and automate comprehensive end-to-end scenarios that cover realistic user flows and adversarial/degraded operating modes.

Scope:
- baseline user journey suites (render/update/hydration/navigation/error recovery),
- differential e2e runs against reference behavior baselines,
- chaos lanes for latency spikes, partial failures, policy demotions, and failover,
- reproducible e2e manifest and replay hooks.","acceptance_criteria":"1. E2E matrix covers core user flows plus degraded/adversarial scenarios.
2. Differential e2e checks detect behavior drift against baseline contracts.
3. Chaos-lane scenarios are deterministic and reproducible from manifests.
4. Promotion gates consume e2e outcomes as required evidence.
5. Every e2e scenario has required companion unit-test anchors and invariant references.
6. Scenario execution emits detailed structured logs with correlation IDs sufficient for deterministic reproduction.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:08.736281484Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:33:15.600175237Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["chaos-testing","differential-testing","e2e","frankenreact-sidecar","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.20.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.20.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:29.172801220Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.20.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.4.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:29.566840122Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.20.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:29.777293738Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.20.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:27:30.034891517Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.20.4","title":"[FRX-20.4] Evidence-Grade Test Logging Schema and Correlation Standards","description":"Specify and enforce high-signal structured logging for unit/e2e suites to minimize triage latency and maximize replay fidelity.

 {"id":"bd-mjh3.6.4","title":"[FRX-06.4] Tail-Latency and Memory Hardening with Regression Gates","description":"Implement tail-latency and memory hardening using decomposition-first diagnostics and risk-bounded tuning.

Required method:
- Tail decomposition ledger: queueing + service + synchronization + retries + GC/allocator + ABI boundary terms.
- Tail-risk objectives (p95/p99/p999 + CVaR) alongside mean/throughput metrics.
- Adversarial workload families that amplify burst, skew, and synchronization stress.
- One-lever optimization discipline with before/after confidence intervals and rollback-ready artifacts.

Safety rule:
- Reject any tuning that improves average metrics while worsening tail-risk budgets or compatibility invariants.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Tail decomposition telemetry is implemented and used for regression triage.
2. CI gates include p95/p99/p999 and memory-tail thresholds, not only averages.
3. Optimization decisions require confidence-qualified before/after evidence and isomorphism notes.
4. Rollback playbooks include trigger thresholds and deterministic fallback actions.

Testing and Logging Contract:
- Add comprehensive unit tests for primary, edge, and failure paths with deterministic fixtures and explicit expected outcomes.
- Add end-to-end test scripts that exercise real user workflows plus adversarial/degraded scenarios, including fallback and recovery paths.
- Emit detailed structured logs for unit and e2e runs (scenario_id, trace_id when available, seed, timing, decision path, outcome) and retain artifacts for replay/triage.
- CI must fail on unit/e2e regression or missing logging artifacts for this bead's deliverables.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:44:11.296437508Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:34.018813649Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-optimization","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:44:12.774221900Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.6.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:44:12.948385022Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mjh3.7","title":"[FRX-07] Toolchain Integration and Ecosystem Interoperability","description":"Make adoption practical in real ecosystems without forcing rewrites.

Deliver:
- bundler/toolchain adapters,
- SSR/hydration/RSC integration path,
- compatibility matrix for major React libraries and app patterns,
- controlled incremental rollout knobs.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Toolchain integrations work in common build stacks.
2. SSR/hydration behavior remains compatible or gracefully falls back.
3. Ecosystem compatibility matrix is evidence-backed.
4. Teams can opt-in incrementally at file/component/route granularity.

Program-Wide Test Gate:
- Every child task must define comprehensive unit-test scope, end-to-end scenario scripts, and detailed structured logging artifacts.
- Feature closure requires linked evidence that unit/e2e suites passed with deterministic fixtures and replay/triage logs.
- Any missing or stale test/logging evidence blocks milestone promotion and release gating.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:41:59.113664862Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:55.227127084Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","frankenreact-sidecar","lane-toolchain","phase-scale","react-compiler"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.7","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:32.281762005Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.7","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:32.440171784Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.7","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:32.567581076Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mjh3.7","depends_on_id":"bd-mjh3.7.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-25T05:25:32.671542558Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
